introSection: Gold Mine is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Pavilion Fun Park in Clacton-on-sea, Essex, England, UK. The ride was manufactured by SBF Visa Group in March 2011 and opened in April. Its serial number is GO2104.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a figure eight layout. It has yellow track and silver supports. There is also an on-ride camera.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Each car looks like a mine-cart.

fullText:
Gold Mine is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Pavilion Fun Park in Clacton-on-sea, Essex, England, UK. The ride was manufactured by SBF Visa Group in March 2011 and opened in April. Its serial number is GO2104.

The ride has a figure eight layout. It has yellow track and silver supports. There is also an on-ride camera.

Each car looks like a mine-cart.
